title: Wagyu French Rillettes
description: A rich and indulgent French-inspired dish featuring tender wagyu meat in a garlicky rillettes sauce.

ingredients.name: Wagyu beef, thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality wagyu beef for optimal flavor and tenderness.

ingredients.name: Garlicky rillettes sauce
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality flaky sea salt for added texture and flavor.

ingredients.name: Freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.notes: Adjust to suit your personal taste.

instructions: Season the wagyu beef with salt and black pepper, then sear in a hot pan with olive oil until browned.
Transfer the beef to a baking dish and cover with foil. Roast in the oven for 2 hours, or until tender and easily shredded.
While the beef is cooking, heat the garlicky rillettes sauce in a separate pan over low heat.
Once the beef is cooked, shred it into bite-sized pieces and add to the rillettes sauce. Stir to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve the wagyu rillettes in individual portions, garnished with fresh thyme and a drizzle of olive oil.
Optional: Serve with toasted bread or crackers for a satisfying snack or light meal.
